ddls:
CREATE TABLE "family_background" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family background entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "famsize" TEXT /* Family size */,
  "Pstatus" TEXT /* Parental status */,
  "Medu" INTEGER /* Mother's education level */,
  "Fedu" INTEGER /* Father's education level */,
  "Mjob" TEXT /* Mother's job */,
  "Fjob" TEXT /* Father's job */,
  "guardian" TEXT /* Guardian of the student */,
  "family_income" INTEGER /* Family income */,
  "parental_occupation" TEXT /* Parental occupation */,
  "parental_education_level" TEXT /* Parental education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle factor entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "traveltime" INTEGER /* Travel time to school */,
  "studytime" INTEGER /* Time spent studying */,
  "failures" INTEGER /* Number of past class failures */,
  "schoolsup" TEXT /* Extra educational support */,
  "famsup" TEXT /* Family educational support */,
  "paid" TEXT /* Payment of school fees */,
  "activities" TEXT /* Extracurricular activities */,
  "nursery" TEXT /* Attended nursery school */,
  "higher" TEXT /* Wants to attend higher education */,
  "internet" TEXT /* Internet access at home */,
  "romantic" TEXT /* In a romantic relationship */,
  "famrel" INTEGER /* Quality of family relationships */,
  "freetime" INTEGER /* Free time after school */,
  "goout" INTEGER /* Going out with friends */,
  "Dalc" INTEGER /* Workday alcohol consumption */,
  "Walc" INTEGER /* Weekend alcohol consumption */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Current health status */,
  "absences" INTEGER /* Number of school absences */,
  "sleep_patterns" TEXT /* Sleep patterns */,
  "exercise_frequency" TEXT /* Exercise frequency */,
  "diet_quality" TEXT /* Diet quality */,
  "screen_time" TEXT /* Screen time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "G1" INTEGER /* First period grade */,
  "G2" INTEGER /* Second period grade */,
  "y" INTEGER /* Final grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "activities" TEXT /* Extracurricular activities */,
  "nursery" TEXT /* Attended nursery school */,
  "higher" TEXT /* Wants to attend higher education */,
  "internet" TEXT /* Internet access at home */,
  "romantic" TEXT /* In a romantic relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "famrel" INTEGER /* Quality of family relationships */,
  "freetime" INTEGER /* Free time after school */,
  "goout" INTEGER /* Going out with friends */,
  "Dalc" INTEGER /* Workday alcohol consumption */,
  "Walc" INTEGER /* Weekend alcohol consumption */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Current health status */,
  "absences" INTEGER /* Number of school absences */,
  "mental_health_status" TEXT /* Mental health status */,
  "physical_activity_level" TEXT /* Physical activity level */,
  "substance_use" TEXT /* Substance use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "schoolsup" TEXT /* Extra educational support */,
  "famsup" TEXT /* Family educational support */,
  "paid" TEXT /* Payment of school fees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "studytime" INTEGER /* Time spent studying */,
  "failures" INTEGER /* Number of past class failures */,
  "G1" INTEGER /* First period grade */,
  "G2" INTEGER /* Second period grade */,
  "y" INTEGER /* Final grade */,
  "assignment_completion_rate" REAL /* Assignment completion rate */,
  "class_participation" REAL /* Class participation */,
  "project_grades" REAL /* Project grades */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the teacher */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject taught by the teacher */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of teaching experience */,
  "qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_courses" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "course_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each family background entry
Unique identifier for each lifestyle factor entry
Unique identifier for each grade entry
Unique identifier for each engagement entry
Unique identifier for each health entry
Unique identifier for each support entry
Unique identifier for each performance entry
Number of credits for the course
